q1.title: Add Two Numbers
q1.description: Write a program that takes two numbers as input and prints their sum.

q2.title: Find Maximum of Three Numbers
q2.description: Write a program that takes three numbers and prints the maximum one.

q3.title: Check Even or Odd
q3.description: Write a program that takes a number and prints 'Even' if it's even, 'Odd' if it's odd.

q4.title: Reverse a String
q4.description: Write a program that takes a string as input and prints it in reverse.

q5.title: Count Character Occurrences
q5.description: Write a program that takes a string and a character, then prints how many times the character appears.
